testcase.name: validation

error.message: Error communicating with the remote browser. It may have died. Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.7' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [8e14842b3a1b9ce4eab6e43781f1401c, findElement [value, using]] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.57, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: C:\Users\SOWNDA~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:57944}, goog:processID: 17648, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:57944/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.57, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true}

testcase.name: invalidpassword

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (901, 37). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.57) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.7' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [8e14842b3a1b9ce4eab6e43781f1401c, clickElement {id=f.C3144101CF984D3EBF6C7948254BC8BF.d.BE07D7B4D72C49B189ADBA7E7968AA33.e.111}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 147.0.7727.57, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 147.0.7727.57 (b4f28b5637d0..., userDataDir: C:\Users\SOWNDA~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:57944}, goog:processID: 17648, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:57944/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.57, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (8e14842b3a1b9ce4eab6e43781f1401c)] -> id: login2] Session ID: 8e14842b3a1b9ce4eab6e43781f1401c
